title: PhenotypeUserStory
description: Canonical YAML contract for @phenotype/user-story annotations embedded in test source files. Harvested by tools/user-story-extract/ and consumed downstream by manifest + doc generators (Batches 2-6).

journey_id.description: Globally unique kebab-case identifier. Must match [a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9].

title.description: Human-readable one-line title for docs and tapes.

persona.description: The actor performing the journey (e.g. 'fleet operator', 'solo dev on MacBook').

given.description: Pre-state prose. One paragraph; may embed cited FR IDs.

when.description: Ordered list of user actions. Each item is a concrete, observable action.

then.description: Ordered list of expected post-conditions / assertions.

traces_to.description: FR IDs this user-story fulfills. At least one required.

record.description: Whether the harvester should attach this story to a recorded manifest/video artifact.

blind_judge.description: Whether the blind VLM judge pipeline runs on the recorded artifact.

backend.description: Override for the recording backend (rust/swift/playwright/k6). Usually auto-inferred from family.

blind_eval.description: Legacy synonym / parallel knob for blind evaluation. 'honest' opts into shared blind suite.

family.description: Test family. Auto-inferred from harvest location if absent (e.g. apps/streamlit/journeys -> streamlit).
